title: Communication Channels
subtitle: Connect with Airflow Korea User Group through various channels

intro.title: Communication Channels for Every Purpose
intro.description: Choose the channel that fits your needs—questions, discussions, networking, and more—and join freely.

forum.title: Forum - In-depth Discussion
forum.description: From technical questions to architectural concerns, share in-depth discussions in a space organized by topic.

chat.title: Real-time Chat - Quick Communication
chat.description: When you want to ask casually and get instant answers, talk freely in a friendly atmosphere.

social.title: Networking Events - Professional Exchange
social.description: Meet real users at meetups and seminars, and share your career and experiences.

video.title: Video - Visual Learning
video.description: Learn visually anytime, anywhere through recorded meetups and tutorial videos.

guidelines.title: Participation Guidelines
guidelines.description: Basic principles for all members to respect each other and create a healthy communication culture.

rules.title: Respect Each Other
rules.description: This is a space where people from various backgrounds and levels come together.

rules.title: Constructive Discussion
rules.description: Please provide suggestions and improvement directions rather than criticism.

rules.title: No Spam
rules.description: Please refrain from unrelated promotions or repetitive posts.

rules.title: Search First
rules.description: Please check if there are existing answers before asking questions.

cta.title: Join the Community Right Now!
cta.description: Grow together with active Korean Airflow users.
